name: Minimum Height Trees
description: Given a tree of n nodes labeled 0 to n-1 with n-1 edges, find all roots that minimize the tree height. These are the centroids of the tree. Hint: repeatedly peel leaf nodes.
constraints: 1 <= n <= 2 * 10^4. edges.length == n - 1. 0 <= edges[i][j] < n. All pairs are unique.
